texto: Now the big question is: what direction are you moving? Look inward
autor: there is a burning desire in your heart that will make you the person you can become – A superstar!
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de there is a burning desire in your heart that will make you the person you can become – A superstar! que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Now the big question is: what direction are you moving? Look inward”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, maureen-lawrence, question, com foco em reflexao.
